Experience WH-1000XM6
TECHNICAL PARAMETERS

Full Specifications.

Review the structural dimensions, processor speeds, noise attenuation metrics, and power details that define the WH‑1000XM6.

Acoustic Driver

Driver Unit 40 mm dome type (CCAW Voice Coil, Bio-Cellulose composite diaphragm)
Frequency Response 4 Hz - 45,000 Hz (Passive)
20 Hz - 40,000 Hz (Active, LDAC 990 kbps)
Impedance 48 Ω (Passive wired connection)
16 Ω (Active unit powered)
Sensitivities 102 dB / mW (Passive wired)
108 dB / mW (Active powered)
Hi-Res Audio Hi-Res Audio (Wired) & Hi-Res Audio Wireless LDAC SUPPORT

Processor & Noise Control

Audio Processors Sony QN6 HD Processor + Integrated Processor V3
ANC Calibration Real-time Cognitive ANC analyzer adapting up to 800 times/second to environmental noise
Microphone Array 8 Beamforming Microphones (4 per ear cup) with AI voice isolation & wind noise protection
Atmospheric Pressure Optimizer Automatic altitude barometric recalibration for constant air cabin isolation
Ambient Audio Smart Ambient Sound control (20 focus levels) with Quick Attention quick-mute

Connectivity & Usability

Bluetooth version Bluetooth® v5.4 (Class 1 Power)
Profiles & Codecs Codecs: LDAC, AAC, SBC, LC3 (LE Audio Ready)
Profiles: A2DP, AVRCP, HFP, HSP
Multi-Point Pairing Seamless active connection up to 3 devices simultaneously
Upscaling DSEE Extreme™ Edge-AI upscaling (restores compressed high-end acoustic layers)
Pairing systems Google Fast Pair & Windows Swift Pair protocols

Power & Battery

Playback Endurance Active ANC: Up to 60 Hours
ANC Disabled: Up to 75 Hours
Fast Charge Technology 5 mins charge = 5 hours playback via high-amp USB Power Delivery (PD) charger
Full Charge Time Approx. 2.5 hours from 0% to 100% capacity
Wired Playback Passive wired audio cable supports playback even with battery fully drained

Industrial Design & Weight

Weight 242 grams (10g lighter than predecessor)
Materials Carbon-fiber reinforced recycled poly-carbonates, eco-friendly vegan leather, memory foam core cushions, ocean plastics packaging
Input / Connectors USB Type-C® port (for charging/audio), 3.5mm gold-plated stereo auxiliary headphone jack
Touch controls Capacitive side panel (volume swipe, track skips, play/pause, voice assistant trigger)
